description.zh-Hans: 通过将边缘区域与其环绕对应部分混合，强制实现无缝平铺。使用「半偏移+交叉淡入」技术：将图像偏移一半，然后使用平滑的径向/边缘遮罩混合原始图像和偏移图像，保证四方无缝边缘和角落连续性。
description.en: Forces seamless tiling by blending edge regions with their wrapped counterparts. Uses the "offset half + cross-fade" technique: offsets the image by half, then blends original and offset using a smooth radial/edge mask, guaranteeing four-way seamless edges and corner continuity.

triggers.zh-Hans: 无缝混合, 边缘混合, 平铺混合, 接缝消除
triggers.en: seamless blend, edge blend, tile blend, seam removal

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 混合可平铺纹理的边缘以创建无缝图案。
exampleUsage.en: Blend the edges of a tileable texture to create a seamless pattern.
